text:
【本日の運勢 ▷ 第9位・8位】

蠍座（10/24〜11/22）
感情の波が静かに高まる一日。
月が感情面に揺らぎをもたらしています。溜め込みやすいので、吐く息に「手放す」イメージを乗せて。

獅子座（7/23〜8/22）
輝きたいのに空回りしやすい日。
太陽のエネルギーは十分ですが、今日は内側の声を聞く方向で。肩甲骨を寄せて胸を開くと循環が戻ります。

感受性の強いお仕事の方は、今日は自分のペースを優先してみてください。
今日も体と心を大切に🌙

#今日の運勢 #星読み

text:
You're more an 'over-the-shoulder' gameplay style, so Fortnight "Save the World" mode with its tower defense and action pauses would work well.
There's also a few exploration games, but those tend to have less action points that I think you want, but Assasin's Creed is cheap if you haven't tried it.

Today, many people try to build their own “LLM Wiki” or even 'Ontology':
- connecting multiple tools

- managing plugins and workflows

There’s a simpler way.

- Upload your files once
- Turn them into AI-ready knowledge "Automatically"

No complex setup. No repeated work.
Just your knowledge — ready for AI.

text:
Today, I took my daughter to a dance competition. Two little girls came over and said to her, “Good job on your dance.”

I was deeply touched by these two little angels. In that moment, I suddenly felt that it would actually be really nice if we could stay in Canada.

text:
【中国語学習】 #語法特訓 より

◆ 理完发 [ lǐwán fà ]
【意味】 「髪を切り終える」という意味の結果補語表現。「理」は「整える」、「完」は「終える」の意味で、髪を切り終えた状態を表す。日本語の「髪を切り終える」に相当する。理髪店での施術が完了した時に使う。離合詞「理发」を分解した形。

【解説】 離合詞「理发」の動詞と目的語の間に補語を挿入した形。清代以降、整髪は身分を問わぬ重要な習慣となった。
【注意】 離合詞のため補語は動詞と目的語の間に置く。「理发完」は誤用。動作完了を表す助詞「了」を伴うのが通例。
【例文】 我刚理完发，感觉整个人清爽多了。

text:
Should editorial board members have published in the journal they serve?

When researchers evaluate a journal, many signals are considered.

Indexing status.
Publisher reputation.
Impact metrics.

Another commonly examined signal is the editorial board.
🧵
author: did:plc:2wmgd3di4gk2loahrtvmredr

text:
Researchers often scan the list of editors to see who is involved. Recognisable names can give confidence that the journal is connected to a credible scholarly community.

________________________________________

The role of an editorial board

Editorial boards exist for a variety of reasons.
author: did:plc:2wmgd3di4gk2loahrtvmredr

text:
Depending on the journal, board members may:

⚫️ Advise on editorial policy
⚫️ Review manuscripts
⚫️ Recommend reviewers
⚫️ Promote the journal within their research community
⚫️ Help shape the intellectual direction of the publication
author: did:plc:2wmgd3di4gk2loahrtvmredr

text:
In principle, editorial boards represent the scholarly community that surrounds a journal.

Their presence signals that the journal is embedded in a particular field.

________________________________________
author: did:plc:2wmgd3di4gk2loahrtvmredr

text:
A simple observation

When looking at some editorial boards, something interesting occasionally stands out.

Some editorial board members appear never to have published in the journal they serve.
author: did:plc:2wmgd3di4gk2loahrtvmredr

⚫️ The editor may have joined recently
⚫️ Their research may sit adjacent to the journal’s core scope
⚫️ They may contribute mainly through reviewing or advising

おはようございます☀️
4/25土曜日、本日もスタートです😊

週末は「働き方の差」が一番出やすいタイミング。
どこで、どんな環境で動くかで結果は大きく変わります✨

「今のままでいいのかな」
「もう少し安定して稼ぎたい」

そう感じている方にこそ、知っていただきたい環境です。

当店では、ただ働くだけではなく、
一人ひとりに合わせた働き方や稼ぎ方を一緒に考えています。

無理をさせるのではなく、
“続けられること”を大切にしながら、しっかり結果に繋げていく。

そんな環境だからこそ、未経験の方でも安心してスタートできます😊

この週末をきっかけに、
新しい一歩を踏み出してみませんか？✨

【本日の運勢 ▷ 第7位・6位】

天秤座（9/23〜10/23）
今日は「決めなくていい日」です。
月がやや不安定な位置にあり、何かを急いで決めようとすると後悔しやすい流れ。
腰のあたりをゆっくり温めると、溜まっていた緊張が解れやすくなります。

射手座（11/23〜12/21）
閉じこもりより、外の空気が薬になる土曜日。
金星の好配置が行動意欲を後押しする日。移動や外出が運気の起爆剤になります。
大腿部の前側を伸ばすひと手間で、下半身の流れが変わります。

今日も体と心を大切に🌙
周りの天秤座・射手座の方にも届けてください

#今日の運勢 #星読み

text:
i made the mistake of blowing up on instagram reels, and now comments like these are flooding my notifs. 

i love wendy carlos but she didn't singlehandedly invent electronic music. queer and black men in the midwest like frankie knuckles and juan atkins are most responsible for house, techno and
author: did:plc:fcc3rqqmeoj336bt5wlcdgl6

text:
electro. 

that isn't to say that they singlehandedly 'invented electronic music' either, though. i don't think any individual person did.

for some of america's most marginalized groups, raves were necessary for survival. it's ultimately a collective experience.
author: did:plc:fcc3rqqmeoj336bt5wlcdgl6

text: the people and the people alone are the makers of history.
author: did:plc:fcc3rqqmeoj336bt5wlcdgl6

text: i don't say any of this to discredit women like wendy carlos or SOPHIE, either. i consider them pioneers, but neither of them "invented" electronic music. y'know what i mean?

text:
In the meantime, enjoy this quick reminder that, since 2025 Q2, the numbers on the site no longer represent the number of lobbying interactions between a lobbyist and an official.

A change in regulations lets lobbyists group multiple dates and activities into a single entry. 😬

From the City’s FAQ:
author: did:plc:7wovxtwhjkd5efostcduyamf

text: It’s possible to extract estimated numbers from these grouped entries … in a way that restores *some* accuracy to the reports. Since the change went into effect, a ton of coding work has gone into speeding up the site’s back-end so that the estimation is itself speedy. Stay tuned, more to come, etc.
author: did:plc:7wovxtwhjkd5efostcduyamf

text:

* may not apply to shady lobbyists**

text:
Throughout the making of the covers album, I jokingly described it as my thesis statement and said that Ron and Russell were my advisors

Just to keep stretching this, the upcoming Fringe shows might either be my graduation or a sabbatical…
author: did:plc:wwk4xg3ijxxszksxgjhcanvo

text: …which is a fancy way of saying that I might step away from this project after July or so
author: did:plc:wwk4xg3ijxxszksxgjhcanvo

text:
This is my favorite album I’ve made and I’m so proud and so grateful for the team that helped me produce and release it

At the same time, I hoped it would reach a wider audience than 50 copies sold and seven monthly listens on Spotify
author: did:plc:wwk4xg3ijxxszksxgjhcanvo

text:
I think I assumed that a banjolele tribute to Sparks would be more of a cult hit in 2025

I also struggled with finding the right venues for the live show and was never entirely happy with the shows I’d been able to do
author: did:plc:wwk4xg3ijxxszksxgjhcanvo

text:
I’d hoped that I’d be able to pull it out at Pride and Halloween as a charity show, but having a show in June cancelled because the venue closed dampened my interest in pursuing that

The low advance ticket sales for Boston Fringe has also tempered my excitement about the show
author: did:plc:wwk4xg3ijxxszksxgjhcanvo

text:
I have some optimism about my future projects 

I’m very excited about the silent movie scores I’m doing for Somerville Cine Club and there are other albums I want to make
author: did:plc:wwk4xg3ijxxszksxgjhcanvo

text:
I’m trying not to think about What Could Have Been with my Sparks covers 

Instead, I’d like to see this show off with a big, glittery Bon Voyage in May

Join me, won’t you?
author: did:plc:wwk4xg3ijxxszksxgjhcanvo

「なぜ、ここまで急騰しているのでしょうか。定期航空協会によりますと、ケロシンは、旅客機だけでなく戦闘機などの軍用機でも使われるため、中東情勢を受けて需要が高まっているということです。また、原油からケロシンを精製できる設備が限られていて、生産量を短期間で増やすことができないことも、需給がひっ迫しやすい要因だとしています。特にヨーロッパでは精製施設が少ないため、アジアから調達しようとする動きが強まって、シンガポール・ケロシンの急騰につながっているということです」

text:
2022年「ヨロン島観光大使」という肩書きをいただいている。

私の発信が、島の印象を作ってしまう部分がある。
間違ったことを伝えたら島に迷惑をかける。良く見せすぎたら「思ったのと違う」になる。

だから「本当のこと」しか言わないようにしている。

「ヨロン島は完璧な楽園です」とは言わない。
「首都圏から直行便はなくアクセスが不便で、夏場は台風も襲来する、でもそれを超える海がある島です」と言う。

マイナスは絶対に隠さない、だから長期的に信頼される。
それが今の発信の根本にある考え方です。

これからも観光大使として、ヨロン人としての視点で、大好きな島を伝えていきます。

text: I mentioned this a few weeks back when Chavez  had posted about this upcoming ordinance, but does anyone remember what employers started doing after 'ban-the-box' laws were passed? They couldn't ask about criminal history so they just used other stereotypical proxies to make their decisions.
author: did:plc:3t6afjj5aykct7b55arrxf5d

text:
I.E., if your name sounded "black" you didn't get callbacks! 

The retaliatory provisions seem fine & sensible, but there's a real risk of bad unintended consequences to mandating what can/can't be asked about & I'm not sure the ordinance or it's supporters really ever considered or addressed that.

text:
Lock in nuggets, the Cretaceous kraken just dropped.

Nanaimoteuthis, was a giant octopus from the Late Cretaceous of Canada and Japan.

And it was enormous (possibly).

With the largest of the species possibly reaching up to 18 meters (60 ft) and the smaller estimates at about 7 meters (22ft).

👇👇
author: did:plc:pfjg5x43u7txlwjdhtgbcwl4

text:
Size estimates are based of the beaks.

This is because octopuses are pretty soft bodied, so it’s incredibly difficult for them to preserve. The beaks are rather large for any octopus.

Analysis of the beaks show wear that implies it was actively hunting larger prey. So it was likely pretty big.

👇👇
author: did:plc:pfjg5x43u7txlwjdhtgbcwl4

text:
So there was a good chance these were apex predators.

But with such little fossil evidence it’s hard to say definitively and you should always be skeptical about animals with such little fossil material.

Either way it’s still pretty cool and I’m excited to learn more about the Cretaceous Kraken.

Spring on Sable Island - Sand Dunes & Freshwater Ponds.
Still hidden by the dry foliage of last year’s vegetation, spring growth is emerging from the cool, damp sand – bright greens of beach pea, clover, wild rose, strawberry, marram, fescue, & poa grasses, & the softer tones of pearly & yarrow….🧵
author: did:plc:2ii7bbydvnen7cmx2c3jgbcz

text:
… Although the new marram leaves are still short (10 to 20 cm) they are abundant and are a primary food for the horses now.
In this first photo, the five tiny black spots in the distance are horses, a family band grazing marram on a dune slope that from far off looks bare….
author: did:plc:2ii7bbydvnen7cmx2c3jgbcz

text:
… In this second photo, two males (still in their winter coats) are walking past a freshwater pond that shows April green along its moist edge. 
Photos Zoe Lucas.  #NorthAtlantic 
#spring #April #wildhorses #wildhorsesofSable 
#parkscanada #SableIslandnpr
#sableislandnationalparkreserve …

Before Stuxnet, there was fast16, a malware built for quiet sabotage.

It didn’t break centrifuges, wipe disks or steal secrets.

It targeted computation itself: patching engineering and simulation software as it loaded to subtly corrupt floating-point calculations for an entire lab.

text:
「えら杉田玄白」の「杉田玄白」の代わりを探そうと、Claud Sonnet 4.6 に
〘「すぎ」で始まる偉人有名人悪人を流しられてそうな順に十人挙げてください〙　とお願いしたら。
---
「杉」で始まる有名人・偉人・悪人を知名度順に10人挙げます。
〘引用者による省略〙
	10.	杉田水脈（すぎた みお）— 政治家（物議を醸した発言で知名度）

「悪人」枠としては 杉田水脈 が該当しそうな位置ですが、歴史的な悪人として「杉」姓の突出した人物は少なく、上記は主に偉人・著名人中心の構成です。​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​
 ---
 と、杉田水脈を悪人枠に入れてきてびっくりした。

text:
『ウクライナ語入門』には

> ペアになっているものなど複数形でしか用いられないものもあります

として，

штани　ズボン
Карпати　カルパチア山脈
меблі　家具
двері　ドア

が挙がっている。
このうち，ズボンや山脈は英語の pants や mountains と同様。
メガネ（宇 окуляри，英 glasses）なんかもそうだよね。
